title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 148.450 - Notices, how given
text:
148.450.  Notices, how given. — Whenever by this law an officer is required to give any notice to a company, the same may be given by mailing the same, postage prepaid, addressed to the company at its home office, or to the secretary, general agent or chief officer thereof in the United States.
(RSMo 1939 § 6103) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5988; 1919 § 6396; 1909 § 7108
